822.title: Bargain Hunt : Hemswell 25
822.description: Anita Manning presents from the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire and is joined by experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. A team of best friends takes on a young married couple to buy three items which they hope will make them a profit at auction.
